title: acanthomintha lanceolata
intro: Acanthomintha lanceolata, also known as Purple Sage or Purple Thistle, is a flowering shrub native to the Channel Islands off the coast of California in the United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Purple Sage include relief from sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as potential protection against cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Acanthomintha lanceolata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
